mapper.insert: insert into cms_student (student_id, student_password, portrait, name, gender, birthday, phone, email, wechat, qq, register_date, register_by, update_date, update_by, description, active) values (#{studentId}, #{studentPassword}, #{avatar}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{wechat}, #{qq}, #{registerDate}, #{registerBy}, #{updateDate}, #{updateBy}, #{description}, 1)
mapper.select: select id, student_id, name from cms_student
